description: Run Metrics That Matter QBRs: the few back-end measures customers feel. Answer access, timeliness, true fix rate versus parts shotgun, and satisfaction. Position every account as important, not only logos.

examples.context: Customer wanted proof support was real. Sales brought fluff. Support brought MTM.
examples.resolution: Meeting stayed on access and fix quality. Renewal conversation grounded.

examples.context: Close rate green. Customer still angry. Parts volume high.
examples.resolution: Shotgun index added to QBR. Coaching and kit rules followed.

examples.context: Mid-size account never got a real ops review.
examples.resolution: Semiannual MTM. Felt heard; escalations dropped.
